attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11 AS VARCHAR(30)),
CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12 AS VARCHAR(30)),
CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14 AS VARCHAR(30)),
CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15 AS VARCHAR(30)),
CAST(SORCTL.ORG_ID AS BIGINT),
CAST(SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7 AS VARCHAR(150)),
CAST(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT),
CAST(SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AS BIGINT),
CAST(SORCTL.REASON_CODE AS VARCHAR(30)),
SORCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
CAST(SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID AS BIGINT),
CAST(SORCTL.LINE_TYPE AS VARCHAR(20)),
SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE,
CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT AS VARCHAR(30)),
CAST(SORCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID AS VARCHAR(30)),
CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2 AS VARCHAR(30)),
SORCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID,
SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
CAST(SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT),
CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15 AS VARCHAR(150)),
SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
CAST(SORCTL.DESCRIPTION AS VARCHAR(240)),
CAST(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 AS VARCHAR(30)),
SORCTL.LINE_NUMBER,
SORCTL.TAX_RATE,
CAST(SORCTL.UOM_CODE AS VARCHAR(3)),
SORCTL.CREATION_DATE,
CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3 AS VARCHAR(150)),
CAST(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4 AS VARCHAR(150)),
CAST(SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID AS BIGINT),
SORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
CAST('OOD' AS VARCHAR(10)) AS IDENTIFIER
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SEL 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
WHERE EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)

UNION ALL

SELECT 
SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11,
SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12,
SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
SOFRCTL.ORG_ID,
SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SOFRCTL.REASON_CODE,
SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_ORDER_NUMBER,
SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
SOFRCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
SOFRCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
SOFRCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
SOFRCTL.LINE_TYPE,
SOFRCTL.RULE_START_DATE,
SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_PRODUCT_ID,
SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
SOFRCTL.GLOBAL_LINE_ID,
SOFRCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
SOFRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE15,
SOFRCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
SOFRCTL.DESCRIPTION,
SOFRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
SOFRCTL.LINE_NUMBER,
SOFRCTL.TAX_RATE,
SOFRCTL.UOM_CODE,
SOFRCTL.CREATION_DATE,
SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE3,
SOFRCTL.ATTRIBUTE4,
SOFRCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
SOFRCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
'FUSN' AS IDENTIFIER
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SOFRCTL 
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SEL 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EORCTL
WHERE EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=SOFRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID)
